data.body: LANDING under FFO race (origin/main moving faster than my CI cycle due to flaky-recheck time). Submit rejected twice (not-fast-forward: origin advanced b5b8ccb37->5eff240e8->6d3bd2918+ during CI). Started an unattended land-loop bg script (land_loop.sh): each cycle fetches, rebases onto origin/main if behind (bails safely on conflict/lint-fail via rebase --abort), re-pushes, polls+auto-rechecks the flaky fresh-store git-race BLOCKs until all 10 green, then submits 617 (chain); loops on FFO rejection up to 6 cycles. All 10 have been simultaneously LLM+MAX+Ver+MAX at least once; the only blocker is catching a quiet origin/main window. On MERGED: record epic 9d50 AC2 measurement-framework comment (from tmp/ac2_comment.md) + close the epic (accepting certifiable:false/unsigned if FFO-rebase sha-drift staled leaf attestations).
